description: Design a radial plate cam profile for an automated packaging machine. The cam must rotate 360 degrees with a base circle radius of 3 units and drive a follower with the following displacement sequence: (1) 0°-90°: Dwell at 0 lift; (2) 90°-180°: Rise 2 units using Simple Harmonic Motion; (3) 180°-270°: Dwell at 2 units lift; (4) 270°-360°: Return to 0 units using Simple Harmonic Motion. Create a parametric curve in GeoGebra that represents this cam profile and save the project as 'cam_profile.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
